name: REF-8008
statusTrace:
adb = <module.adb_tool.ADBTool object at 0x000002864723D940>

    @allure.title("REF-8008")
    def test_REF_8008(adb):
    
        # ======================== Extract Permissions ========================
    
        with allure.step("Step 1: Extract permission requests from APK via AAPT2"):
            permissions = _get_apk_permissions()
            assert permissions, (
                f"No permissions found in APK: {APK_PATH}"
            )
    
        # ======================== Check Granted ========================
    
        with allure.step(f"Step 2: Verify all permissions granted for {PACKAGE}"):
            req_accept = adb.shell(f"dumpsys package {PACKAGE}")
            granted = set()
            for req in permissions:
                rule = re.compile(rf'{re.escape(req)}:\s*granted=true')
                if rule.search(req_accept):
                    granted.add(req)
    
            missing = set(permissions) - granted
>           assert not missing, (
                f"Permissions not granted for {PACKAGE}:\n"
                + "\n".join(sorted(missing))
            )
E           AssertionError: Permissions not granted for com.fca.uconnect.sos:
E             android.permission.CALL_PRIVILEGED
E           assert not {'android.permission.CALL_PRIVILEGED'}
